$comment: c24 IDENTITY-SAFETY WITNESS (D-CSUBSET-SELF-REFERENTIAL-STRUCT): two same-name DIFFERENT-layout block-scoped structs in ONE CU stay DISTINCT (decl-site identity). file-scope struct S{int a} vs block-scope struct S{int x,y,z}; 5+1+2+3=11. A name-only identity would merge them (file-scope size-4 layout) and the inner .y/.z would read past it -> off 11. Release pipeline + all 4 targets.
